about.heroTitle: Over 5 years of experience in technical handovers
about.heroDescription: {siteName} is a team of technical handover specialists. We protect your investment in Małopolska, Silesia, and Subcarpathia.
about.heroImageAlt: Interior of a new apartment — technical handover

whoWeAre.title: Who we are
whoWeAre.paragraph1: The company was founded from a passion for property and the need to give clients certainty that the apartments they buy — whether new from a developer or from the secondary market — are free from technical defects.
whoWeAre.paragraph2: We ensure that every technical handover runs smoothly and without stress, so clients can enjoy a safe and comfortable home that fully meets their expectations.
whoWeAre.paragraph3: To date we have served hundreds of clients, helping them with handovers of apartments and houses from the primary and secondary markets in Małopolska, Silesia, and Subcarpathia. Our commitment to service quality earns us overwhelmingly positive reviews, which drives us to keep going.

values.reliabilityDesc: We conduct every handover in accordance with Polish building standards, technical conditions, and the developer agreement. We do not skip a single element.
values.teamDesc: An experienced team of technical handover specialists. Deep knowledge of building materials and technologies means we catch defects that non-specialists miss.
values.reviewsDesc: Our commitment to service quality is reflected in over 100 Google reviews with an average of 5.0/5. That is the best proof of our effectiveness.
values.regionsDesc: We carry out handovers in Małopolska, Silesia, and Subcarpathia. We come to you — no travel required on your part.

team.title: Our team
team.description: A team of technical handover specialists. Thanks to deep knowledge of building materials and technologies, we provide reliable technical assessments of buildings, giving our clients safety and confidence.

cta.title: Don't wait — protect your investment
cta.description: Contact us and book a technical handover. Free quote within 24 hours.

offer.title: Services
offer.subtitle: Four core services and three additional ones — a full catalogue of technical support for property buyers.
offer.heroImageAlt: Technical inspector during a property handover

cta.title: Not sure which service to choose?
cta.description: Call or write — we will match the scope to your property and budget.

developer.title: Developer property handovers
developer.desc: Thorough inspection of developer finish in accordance with the agreement, design, and building standards. We check room geometry, plaster, floor finishes, joinery, installations, and ventilation.
bullets: Verification of compliance with developer agreement and Polish Standards
Plumb, level, angle, and geometry checks
Complete protocol with photos and legal basis
developer.imageAlt: Moisture measurement during a technical apartment handover

secondary.title: Secondary market property inspections
secondary.desc: Technical assessment of a used apartment before purchase. We detect hidden defects and identify negotiation points before you buy.
bullets: Detection of hidden defects (moisture, finish damage)
Thermal imaging survey — detection of heat loss
Estimated renovation cost valuation — additional service

thermal.title: Thermal imaging surveys
thermal.desc: Non-invasive diagnostics of heat loss, thermal bridges, damp, and workmanship defects — with a professional thermographic report.
bullets: Detection of thermal bridges and air leakage
Assessment of wall and ceiling insulation quality
thermal.imageAlt: Thermal imaging survey of a property

advisory.title: Investment advisory and finishing crew supervision
advisory.desc: Support at every stage of your investment — from property selection to supervision of renovation crews. We protect your budget and schedule.

premiumLegal.title: Package: Contract review by a solicitor + Technical inspection
premiumLegal.desc: Complete legal and technical protection. An experienced solicitor analyses the developer agreement for prohibited clauses, risks, and terms requiring negotiation.
bullets: Full legal audit of the developer agreement
Identification of prohibited clauses and risks

surveys.title: Architectural surveys
surveys.desc: Precise mapping of structural layout, measurements, and verification of digital plans for interior designers and renovation needs.
bullets: Laser measurements accurate to the millimetre
Digital plans in DWG and PDF formats
Verification of actual dimensions against design
Documentation of installations and structural elements

energy.title: Energy audits and performance certificates
energy.desc: Official energy performance certificates and thermal assessment of properties — required for sale and rental.

krakow.title: Apartment handover Kraków — specialist technical inspection
krakow.description: We carry out technical handovers of apartments and houses in every district of Kraków — from Prądnik Biały, through Krowodrza and Bronowice, to Podgórze and Nowa Huta. Over 5 years of local experience and {count}+ 5★ reviews on Google.
krakow.reviewQuote: "The apartment handover in Kraków (Prądnik Biały) met all expectations. Professional report."

districts.title: We carry out handovers in every district of Kraków
districts.subtitle: We know the specifics of local investments, developer workmanship standards, and the most common technical issues in each area of the city.

developers.title: We know the standards of Kraków developers
developers.description: Over the past 5 years we have carried out handovers in investments by the largest developers in Kraków. We know what to pay particular attention to with each contractor — from plaster quality and floor finishes to window joinery.
developers.disclaimer: * The developer list is for information only — it does not constitute a commercial partnership. We carry out independent technical handovers in the interest of buyers.

privacy.disclaimer: In case of discrepancies, the Polish version prevails.
privacy.title: Privacy policy

1.title: 1. Data controller
1.content: The controller of your personal data is {legalName}, registered at {street}, {postalCode} {city}. Contact for data protection matters: {email}.

2.title: 2. Purposes and legal bases of processing
2.intro: We process your personal data for the following purposes:
items: handling enquiries and preparing quotes (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR — steps prior to entering into a contract);
performance of technical handover and related service contracts (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR);
website traffic analysis using Google Analytics (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR — only with your consent).

3.title: 3. Data recipients
3.content: Your data may be shared with our trusted subcontractors: hosting providers (Netlify), analytics tools (Google Analytics — with consent), accounting, and legal services. All recipients are obliged to maintain confidentiality and protect data in accordance with the GDPR.

4.title: 4. Retention period
4.content: We retain contact data for the period necessary to respond (up to 12 months), and in the case of a contract — for the duration of performance and 5 years after completion (accounting and tax obligations).

5.title: 5. Your rights
5.intro: Under the GDPR, you have the right to:
items: access your data and receive a copy;
rectification, erasure, or restriction of processing;
withdraw consent at any time (without affecting the lawfulness of processing before withdrawal);
lodge a complaint with the President of the Personal Data Protection Office (UODO).

6.title: 6. Cookies
6.content: The website uses cookies necessary for proper operation and — with your consent — Google Analytics cookies (with IP anonymisation). Consent can be withdrawn at any time by clearing browser data.

7.title: 7. Transfers to third countries
7.content: Due to the use of Google Analytics, data may be transferred outside the EEA on the basis of standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission.

8.title: 8. Automated decision-making
8.content: We do not use automated decision-making or profiling within the meaning of Art. 22 GDPR.

9.title: 9. Contact
9.content: For matters relating to personal data protection, please contact us at {email} or by phone: {phone}.
